mapper.sql: CASE A.KNWLDG_TY_CODE WHEN '01' THEN '업무지식' WHEN '02' THEN '기술지식' WHEN '03' THEN '정책지식' ELSE A.KNWLDG_TY_CODE END
CASE A.KNWLDG_EVL WHEN '1' THEN '평가완료' WHEN '2' THEN '평가중' WHEN '0' THEN '평가대기' ELSE A.KNWLDG_EVL END

A.KNWLDG_ID AS knoId , A.KNWLDG_NM AS knoNm , AS knoTypeNm , A.KNWLDG_EVL AS knoAps , AS regstNm , A.EVL_DE AS appYmd , A.OTHBC_AT AS othbcAt , (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS userNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

AND A.OTHBC_AT = 'Y'
AND A.KNWLDG_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
mapper.select: /* 지식 평가 목록 총 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DAM_KNO_IFM A WHERE 1=1
